'''âd-th-w''' ('''kadathaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mockbust|mockbust]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-th-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mockbust|mockbust]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-th-w
|-
! Lemma
| kadathaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidathaw|thidathaw]] || [[word:jidathaw|jidathaw]] || [[word:shidathaw|shidathaw]] || [[word:kidathaw|kidathaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudathaw|thuthudathaw]] || [[word:jujudathaw|jujudathaw]] || [[word:shushudathaw|shushudathaw]] || [[word:kukudathaw|kukudathaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudathaw|thudathaw]] || [[word:judathaw|judathaw]] || [[word:shudathaw|shudathaw]] || [[word:kudathaw|kudathaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudathaw|thudathaw]] || [[word:judathaw|judathaw]] || [[word:shudathaw|shudathaw]] || [[word:kudathaw|kudathaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedathaw|thedathaw]] || [[word:jedathaw|jedathaw]] || [[word:shedathaw|shedathaw]] || [[word:kedathaw|kedathaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodathaw|thothodathaw]] || [[word:jojodathaw|jojodathaw]] || [[word:shoshodathaw|shoshodathaw]] || [[word:kokodathaw|kokodathaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodathaw|thodathaw]] || [[word:jodathaw|jodathaw]] || [[word:shodathaw|shodathaw]] || [[word:kodathaw|kodathaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodathaw|thodathaw]] || [[word:jodathaw|jodathaw]] || [[word:shodathaw|shodathaw]] || [[word:kodathaw|kodathaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdathaw|thĂŠdathaw]] || [[word:jĂŠdathaw|jĂŠdathaw]] || [[word:shĂŠdathaw|shĂŠdathaw]] || [[word:kĂŠdathaw|kĂŠdathaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadathaw|thathadathaw]] || [[word:jajadathaw|jajadathaw]] || [[word:shashadathaw|shashadathaw]] || [[word:kakadathaw|kakadathaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadathaw|thadathaw]] || [[word:jadathaw|jadathaw]] || [[word:shadathaw|shadathaw]] || [[word:kadathaw|kadathaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadathaw|thadathaw]] || [[word:jadathaw|jadathaw]] || [[word:shadathaw|shadathaw]] || [[word:kadathaw|kadathaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadathaw|shadathaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadathaw|goshadathaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadathaw|gokishadathaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadathawnĂŒ|shadathawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadathawnknĂŒ|goshadathawnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadathawnĂŒ|gokishadathawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadathawshĂ«|shadathawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadathawnkshĂ«|goshadathawnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadathawshĂ«|gokishadathawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadathawro|shadathawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadathawnkro|goshadathawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadathawro|gokishadathawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadathawmu|shadathawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadathawnkmu|goshadathawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadathawmu|gokishadathawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadathawsher|shadathawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadathawnksher|goshadathawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadathawsher|gokishadathawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadathawng|shadathawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadathawnkng|goshadathawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadathawng|gokishadathawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadathawya|shadathawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadathawnkya|goshadathawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadathawya|gokishadathawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadathawyam|shadathawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadathawnkyam|goshadathawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadathawyam|gokishadathawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadathawnĂŒshĂ«|shadathawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadathawnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadathawnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadathawnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadathawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadathawnĂŒro|shadathawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadathawnknĂŒro|goshadathawnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadathawnĂŒro|gokishadathawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadathawnĂŒmu|shadathawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadathawnknĂŒmu|goshadathawnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadathawnĂŒmu|gokishadathawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadathawshĂ«nĂŒ|shadathawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadathawnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadathawnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadathawshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadathawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadathawshĂ«ro|shadathawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadathawnkshĂ«ro|goshadathawnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadathawshĂ«ro|gokishadathawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadathawshĂ«mu|shadathawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadathawnkshĂ«mu|goshadathawnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadathawshĂ«mu|gokishadathawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadathawronĂŒ|shadathawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadathawnkronĂŒ|goshadathawnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadathawronĂŒ|gokishadathawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadathawroshĂ«|shadathawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadathawnkroshĂ«|goshadathawnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadathawroshĂ«|gokishadathawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadathawromu|shadathawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadathawnkromu|goshadathawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadathawromu|gokishadathawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadathawmunĂŒ|shadathawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadathawnkmunĂŒ|goshadathawnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadathawmunĂŒ|gokishadathawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadathawmushĂ«|shadathawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadathawnkmushĂ«|goshadathawnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadathawmushĂ«|gokishadathawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadathawmuro|shadathawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadathawnkmuro|goshadathawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadathawmuro|gokishadathawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
